metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_3114
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig.12: "Electron microscopic localization of a8 immunoreactivity in dendrites in the hilus of the dentate gyrus"
- "B A higher-magnification micrograph of a dendritic spine showing a8 immunoreactivity associated with the post-synaptic density (arrow) and structures resembling the spine apparatus (arrowhead)."

Fig.13: "Ultrastructural localization of a8 labeling in dendrites in stratum radiatum of the CA3 region of the hippocampus
- "a8 immunoreactivity is shown in a dendritic shaft (D) primarily associated with a density post-synaptic to an unlabeled terminal (LIT). B: Labeling for a8 is found in a spine (arrow) emanating from the shaft of a small dendrite. A second dendritic spine on the same dendrite is apparently unlabeled (open arrow)"

- Based on the known transmembrane topology of the protein, the "integral component of ... membrane" term was chosen.. Experimental description: - "Sprague-Dawley rats (Hilltop Lab. Animals, Inc.) were used in these experiments. "

checks.label: OWL Consistency
checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
